name: Chunky Beef Fritters
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the cooked roast beef into 1/2 to 1-inch pieces.
2. Combine milk and flour; stir into eggs.
3. Combine self-rising flour, salt, and pepper.
4. Dip roast beef chunks in egg mixture and dredge in flour mixture.
5. Fry in hot deep fat until browned and heated through.
6. Drain on absorbent paper towels and serve hot.
NOTE: Serve in divided serving dish surrounded by pickles, cherry tomatoes, green pepper rings, carrot curls, celery sticks, and parsley, as desired.
